title: FaxeL's Enchanted Books
description: Simple and clear view for enchantment books
body:
Simple textures for enchantment books, divided by the type of item the enchantment is applied to.

This resourcepack requires [Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) to work!

There are also textures for regular books, if you suddenly need textures without icons. Just rename the regular book to the texture name.
